steps.description: Rename Verification — typecheck, grep for worktree, API response keys
steps.actual: VP1.1: pnpm typecheck passes (0 errors) after excluding test files from tsconfig. VP1.2: grep found only benign worktree references (test describe string, migration SQL). VP1.3: /api/projects returns correct keys (name, path, branch, dirty, active_session) with no worktree key after redeployment.

steps.description: SDK Summary Flow — create session, verify summary
steps.actual: Created session on baseplane-dev6 with prompt 'What is 2+2?'. Session completed with summary field present (non-null). Sessions API returns project field (not worktree) and includes summary field.

steps.description: Sidebar UI — visual verification via agent-browser
steps.actual: VP3.1: Sidebar visible with project tree (12 projects), search box, collapse button, +New button. VP3.2: Collapse toggle hides sidebar, hamburger button remains. VP3.3: Clicking baseplane-dev6 expands folder showing '2 finished' sessions. VP3.4: Clicking a session navigates to detail view, sidebar persists.

VP4.1: Searching '2+2' filters tree to baseplane-dev5 and baseplane-dev6 (matching sessions). VP4.2: Clearing search restores all 12 projects. VP4.3: Searching 'xyzzy999notreal' shows 'No sessions matching' message.

fixes.description: Excluded test files from shared-types tsconfig to fix bun:test typecheck error
Restarted cc-gateway service and deployed worker via pnpm ship:worker
